items.summary: Audit and fix the backend Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) and migration module (backend/migration.mo) to ensure all six ProductDetail records are fully seeded in stable storage with correct category slugs ('rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', 'makhana') and comprehensive variants: Rice (Basmati Rice, Sona Masoori, IR-64 Parboiled Rice, Brown Rice, Broken Rice), Wheat (Durum Wheat, Whole Wheat, Semolina), Pulses (Chana Dal, Moong Dal, Masoor Dal, Urad Dal, Toor Dal, Rajma, Kabuli Chana), Spices (Turmeric, Red Chilli, Coriander, Cumin, Black Pepper, Cardamom, Ginger Powder, Fenugreek), Processed Food Products (Rice Flour, Wheat Flour/Atta, Besan/Gram Flour, Poha/Flattened Rice, Roasted Chana, Vermicelli), Makhana (Fox Nut Regular, Fox Nut Premium, Roasted Makhana, Makhana Powder). Each variant must have a name and imageUrl pointing to /assets/generated/<category>-<variant-slug>.png. Every ProductDetail record must retain fully populated nutritionData, specifications, description, price, and imageUrl. The getProductByCategory function must look up records by these exact lowercase hyphenated slugs. Migration must run on postupgrade without overwriting existing contact form or order data.

Fix the Products page (frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx) to correctly fetch and display the full set of variants for each of the six product category cards (Rice, Wheat, Pulses, Spices, Processed Food Products, Makhana) from the backend. Each category card must show all variant names and their corresponding images in a scrollable or grid sub-section within or below the category card. The category card navigation links must use the exact URL slugs 'rice', 'wheat', 'pulses', 'spices', 'processed-food-products', and 'makhana'. Do not alter the overall page structure or category card navigation links.

Fix the ProductDetail page (frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx) and the useGetProductByCategory hook (frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts) to ensure all six product categories display their full variant list and product information. The hook must pass the productId URL parameter (category slug) as-is to the backend getProductByCategory call, enable the query only when productId is defined, and treat null/undefined/empty responses as a 'not found' state without crashing. The Product Variants grid section must display all variants returned by the backend, showing each variant's name and image. The variant selector for Add to Cart must be pre-populated with the full variant list. Do not alter existing product image, specifications table, nutritional information section, or add-to-cart controls.

Generate representative static images for all product variants that are missing from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Required images (filenames must exactly match the imageUrl values stored in the backend variant records): rice-basmati.png, rice-sona-masoori.png, rice-ir64.png, rice-brown.png, rice-broken.png, wheat-durum.png, wheat-whole.png, wheat-semolina.png, pulses-chana-dal.png, pulses-moong-dal.png, pulses-masoor-dal.png, pulses-urad-dal.png, pulses-toor-dal.png, pulses-rajma.png, pulses-kabuli-chana.png, spices-turmeric.png, spices-red-chilli.png, spices-coriander.png, spices-cumin.png, spices-black-pepper.png, spices-cardamom.png, spices-ginger-powder.png, spices-fenugreek.png, processed-rice-flour.png, processed-wheat-flour.png, processed-besan.png, processed-poha.png, processed-roasted-chana.png, processed-vermicelli.png, makhana-regular.png, makhana-premium.png, makhana-roasted.png, makhana-powder.png.
